turns.text: Netflix added 9.8 million subscribers in Q1 2026, ahead of expectations, to reach 337 million. Formula 1 streaming began on Netflix in March and became the most-watched live sports event in our history, with the Australian Grand Prix drawing 28 million concurrent viewers. Advertising revenue grew 180% year-over-year and now represents 14% of total revenue. We are raising our full-year 2026 subscriber growth target to 35–40 million net adds.

Q1 2026 revenue was $11.8 billion, up 13% year-over-year. Operating margin was 29.4%. The lower margin reflects Formula 1 rights cost front-loading in Q1. Full-year margin is expected to be above 34% as rights costs amortize evenly. For Q2 2026, we expect revenue of $12.5–13.0 billion and operating margin of approximately 32%.
Our next question comes from Mark Mahaney at Evercore ISI.
Greg, advertising at 14% of revenue with 180% growth — at what revenue scale does Netflix need to build its own ad tech stack rather than relying on Microsoft xandr?

statements.claim: Netflix added 9.8 million subscribers in Q1 2026 to reach 337 million.
Formula 1 Australian Grand Prix drew 28 million concurrent viewers on Netflix, the most-watched live sports event in Netflix history.
Netflix advertising revenue grew 180% year-over-year in Q1 2026 and represents 14% of total revenue.
Netflix is raising its full-year 2026 subscriber growth target to 35–40 million net adds.
Netflix full-year 2026 operating margin is expected to be above 34% as Formula 1 rights costs amortize evenly.
